ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for each exchange */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for each exchange */,
  "data_feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed for each exchange */,
  "data_feed_format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed for each exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of each exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  "currency_type" TEXT /* Type of each currency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain platform associated with each currency */,
  "consensus_algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by each currency's blockchain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange providing the data feed */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency being tracked */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed */,
  "data_feed_description" TEXT /* Description of each data feed */,
  "data_feed_status" TEXT /* Status of each data feed */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Update frequency of each data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed the record belongs to */,
  "time_open" TEXT /* Timestamp of the start of the data period */,
  "time_close" TEXT /* Timestamp of the end of the data period */,
  "price_open" REAL /* Opening price of the currency during the period */,
  "price_close" REAL /* Closing price of the currency during the period */,
  "price_high" REAL /* Highest price of the currency during the period */,
  "price_low" REAL /* Lowest price of the currency during the period */,
  "trades_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the period */,
  "volume_traded" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the period */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the currency */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the currency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the currency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trader account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trader's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst viewing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the data was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_views_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_views_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader or analyst receiving the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id", "role_id")
)
